title: More Villagers
description: This mod adds new peasant professions to minecraft. New trades and textures. Try it!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55b0c12979b27be444904053bc85aacc97661dd3.png)

```
This mod adds new villagers that you can trade with
```

----------------------------

### Professions

----------------------------

- _Beekeeper_
- _Mariner_
- _Gardener_
- _Woodcutter_
- _Hunter_
- _Archaeologist_
- _Musician_
- _Mechanic_
- _Baker_
- _Painter_

----------------------------


```
To see all blocks of professions, press the  key G (guide)
```


----------------------------


<details>
<summary>Languages</summary>

The modification has 13 languages: Ukrainian, English, Spanish, German, French, Polish, Korean, Chinese, Japanese, Indonesian, Vietnamese, Italian and Portuguese.

You can help with the translation. If you find any mistakes in the translation, you can write to me in my Discord server [https://discord.gg/x9Jwj6xJy9](https://discord.gg/x9Jwj6xJy9)

</details>



----------------------------
